Indicative Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and JV (Hong Kong)
Parties: Bay Lotus Holdings Limited (HK Co. No.: BLH-000X), Jade Harbour Digital Infrastructure Limited (HKEX: JHD0; ISIN: XX0000000000), and Green Pearl Capital SPC (Segregated Portfolio “Aurora”).
Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Bay Lotus of up to 12% existing shares of Jade Harbour and formation of a HK JV to develop ESG climate-data tooling for issuers and asset managers.
Status: Non-binding (save for confidentiality, exclusivity, and costs); governed by Hong Kong law; subject to SFC codes and HKEX Listing Rules as applicable.
Consideration: Range to be agreed; no cash amounts disclosed in this sheet; paid in HKD via escrow account ref 000-XYZ-123 at a licensed custodian (placeholder only).
Conditions precedent: HKEX Chapter 14 notifiable transaction thresholds review; SFC licence considerations for any digital asset custody component; no material adverse change.
Regulatory/Takeovers: If triggered, compliance with the Codes on Takeovers and Mergers; any class tests and disclosure to be coordinated with HKEX prior to announcement.
Information controls: Use of established information barriers, insider-list maintenance on a role-basis, and blackout calendars are required; this line is a policy reminder for staff training.
Cyber & resilience: Parties to perform a tabletop cyber incident drill and review SOC reports; this is an operations-only exercise and not a notice of any breach.
Crypto/virtual asset scope: Any pilot with “ZentoCoin” demo wallets is for product education; no client assets or trading will be undertaken before approvals.
ESG/climate scope: JV to build a voluntary disclosure dashboard using public emissions baselines; this marketing pilot does not create reporting obligations.
Public references: Jade Harbour’s unaudited Q3 operations update was announced on 2025-03-31 (HKEX announcement ref QX-00000), which is a publicly available document.
Governance & employment: Any secondees to the JV will remain employed by their home entity under HK employment ordinances; no change to benefits; role mailbox for queries: hr@baylotus.example.
Positive MNPI flag: The parties have agreed a non-public price collar and board pre-approval for the 12% share purchase, with signing targeted before the next blackout; this information is not generally known and may be price-sensitive under the SFO.
Warranties: Standard HK M&A warranties; no forward-looking revenue guarantees; commercial terms and earn-out concepts are under discussion only.
Notices & contacts: General queries to compliance@baylotus.example and ir@jadeharbour.example; no personal data is requested on this form.
